name: Alpaca (US equities + options + crypto)
description: Broker execution plugin for Alpaca commission-free US equities, options, and crypto. Paper-mode default; BYOK via the OS keychain (broker:alpaca:api_key + broker:alpaca:api_secret). Order placement gated by the v0.5.0 safety layer (BLUEPRINT §6.5).
author: Vysted Team
